sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62279" key="leiriopolfanemw/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειρ-ιοπολφᾰνεμώνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n62279.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">omelet made with lilies</tr_>, etc., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:130:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">130.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
